Lush Biotech & Engineering

HACK 'N'
SOLVE

Join the premier collaborative hackathon at the intersection of nature-inspired biotech and blocky innovation. Hosted by GDG on Campus: IGDTUW x IITD.

The Lush Evolution

Devcation 2026 is more than a hackathon. It's a digital ecosystem where students from IGDTUW and IIT Delhi converge to build sustainable, bio-inspired solutions within a structured, geometric framework.

We leverage the simplicity of 'blocky' design to solve complex real-world biological and technical challenges. Our goal is to foster a community of developers who prioritize modularity, efficiency, and ecological consciousness.

48H Of Building
500+ Hackers
₹5L+ Prize Pool
20+ Mentors

Mission Parameters

Location

Hybrid: Online Qualifiers & On-site Finals at IIT Delhi / IGDTUW Campuses.

Registration

Open for all university students. Apply individually or as a block-team.

Team Size

2-4 Members per squad. Diversify roles for optimal scoring.

Dates

March 14-16, 2026. Mark your calendars for the lush evolution.

Loot
Table

Exceptional efforts yield legendary rewards. Our prize pool is designed to fuel your next big venture.

Event Protocol

Phased Execution Plan

Phase 0: Launch

Jan 15, 2026 - Registrations open to all explorers.

Phase 1: Concept Build

Feb 20, 2026 - Preliminary idea submission and screening.

Phase 2: The Hack

March 14, 2026 - 48-hour build cycle starts at dawn.

Phase 3: The Pitch

March 16, 2026 - Final presentation to the Biotech Council.

Knowledge Base

What is the theme for Devcation 2026? ▼
The core theme is 'Bio-Geometric Innovation' — applying structured, block-based logic to solve biological and ecological challenges using technology.
Is there a registration fee? ▼
No, the event is completely free for all selected participants, courtesy of GDG and our partners.
Can beginners participate? ▼
Absolutely! We have dedicated workshops and mentors to help novice builders construct their first blocks of code.
